# Templates — Engineering OS

**Status:** Approved
**Version:** 1.0
**Owner:** Technical Writer
**Last Updated:** 2026-06-29

This directory is the index of reusable document templates for Engineering OS. Templates give every contributor a consistent starting point for the recurring artifacts the company produces, so structure, ownership, and definition-of-done are uniform across the organization. The Technical Writer owns the templates in this directory; department leads own the canonical sources they point to.

This directory is being populated incrementally. Until a template lands here directly, this index links to its canonical home elsewhere in `docs/`.

## Templates

| Template | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [Employee Handbook Template](../company/EMPLOYEE_TEMPLATE.md) | Canonical structure for every employee handbook — identity, mission, responsibilities, authority, memory, KPIs, decision framework, and definition of done. |

## Conventions

- Every template begins with the standard front-matter block (Status, Version, Owner, Last Updated), matching [docs/architecture/COMPANY_RUNTIME.md](../architecture/COMPANY_RUNTIME.md).
- Templates describe company behavior and structure, not AI orchestration, prompts, or implementation technology.
- When you add a new template, link it from this index with a one-line description and assign it an owner.

## Related

- [docs/company/](../company/README.md) — Company operating system, playbook, and the canonical employee template.
- [docs/employees/](../employees/) — Concrete employee handbooks instantiated from the Employee Handbook Template.
- [docs/](../README.md) — Top-level documentation map.
